sections.paragraph:
- Original: Ἄννα

- Transliteration: Anna

- Phonetic: an'-nah

- Definition: Anna = "grace"

1. A prophetess in Jerusalem at the time of the Lord's presentation in the Temple. She was of the tribe of Asher.

- Origin: of hebrew origin H2584

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: Of hebrew origin [H2584]; Anna an Israelitess: - Anna.
